data.description: Announcing the AGM for Royal Unibrew A/S, with key numbers disclosed.

data.title: Novo Nordisk Wins FDA Nod For First-Ever Weekly Basal Insulin​
data.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved Novo Nordisk A/S' Awiqli (insulin icodec-abae) as the first once-weekly basal insulin for adults with Type 2 diabetes. This approval is significant as it offers a shift in diabetes care by potentially easing the daily injection burden while still maintaining glycemic control. Awiqli is to be used alongside diet and exercise to enhance blood sugar levels in adults with Type 2 diabetes. This new treatment introduces a once-weekly dosing schedule, providing an alternative to the conventional daily basal insulin therapies. The approval of Awiqli is considered an important advancement in diabetes care, offering a novel option for adult patients with Type 2 diabetes.

data.title: Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) Places Follow-On Order for Additional Teledyne GAVIA AUV Systems
data.description: Teledyne Gavia, a prominent provider of modular autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) systems under Teledyne Marine, has disclosed that the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) recently made a subsequent request for more GAVIA Autonomous Underwater Vehicles alongside payload modules. This follows a prior delivery of GAVIA systems to the Swedish Armed Forces in 2025. The deal was formalized during the Navy Tech Conference held in Gothenburg, Sweden.

data.title: Cloud for Good Acquires EMS Consulting, Expanding Salesforce Expertise and Impact to the Financial Services Sector
data.description: Today, in Asheville, North Carolina, Cloud for Good, a prominent Salesforce consulting partner specializing in higher education, nonprofit, and government sectors, disclosed its acquisition of EMS Consulting, a company known for its expertise in Salesforce solutions. The acquisition signifies a strategic move towards expanding their services and offerings.

data.title: medicube Announces and Debuts Largest U.S. Consumer Activation at Coachella 2026
data.description: In its most extensive cultural initiative to date, medicube is establishing itself as a key player in the realms of music, beauty, and groundbreaking ideas. The event, held in Los Angeles on March 27, 2026, heralded the global skincare brand's reputation for advanced clinical technology and cutting-edge beauty solutions.

data.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. Q1 2026 Results and Investor Call Notification
data.description: Luxembourg-based Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. is set to hold its Q1 2026 earnings call on April 23, 2026. The company will release its financial results on the same day at midday BST (07:00 EDT) on their official website for investors to access. Stay tuned for the latest updates on their financial performance.

data.title: Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. VI Announces Pricing of $220 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Miami Beach, FL, Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. VI announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 22,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. These units, to be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "IPFXU," consist of one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. Each full warrant allows the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. After the units trade separately, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to be listed on Nasdaq under the symbols "IPFX" and "IPFXW," respectively.

data.title: Sunset World Group Ready to Welcome Members and Guests This Easter Week
data.description: In anticipation of the upcoming Easter break in March 27, 2026, Sunset World Group in Cancun, Mexico, is gearing up to host Club Sunset members at their hotels in Cancun and the Riviera Maya. The exclusive program includes a variety of activities, culinary delights, and entertainment options tailored for guests of all ages.

data.title: LEAD Public Schools Selects Zum to Deliver Reliable, Modern Student Mobility
data.description: Charter schools in the Nashville area have collaborated with Zum to update transportation services. A driver hiring event is set to take place from March 31 to April 1. LEAD Public Schools, a prominent charter school network in Nashville, chose Zum for this initiative. This modernization effort aims to enhance transportation for students in the region.

data.title: Bybit Launches Cruel Oil (CLUSDT) Perpetual Contract with Up to 50x Leverage
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange, Bybit, introduced the CLUSDT Perpetual Contract. This new offering allows traders to delve into crude oil futures with leverage up to 50x. The trading option is already accessible on the platform, providing users with an opportunity to engage in this market.

data.title: Otsuka Pharmaceutical to Acquire Transcend Therapeutics
data.description: Otsuka Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. has announced its acquisition to expand its portfolio in the psychiatric and neurological fields, with the objective of hastening the development of Transcend's portfolio. This includes the advancement of the TSND-201 program targeting post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD). The deal was unveiled in Tokyo and New York on March 27, 2026. This move positions Otsuka to enhance its offerings and resources in the specified therapeutic areas, indicating a strategic focus on addressing mental health conditions.

data.title: CYBER ENVIRO-TECH RECEIVES INITIAL ORDER INQUIRY FOR AIRPOWER SYSTEMS IN AFRICA, HIGHLIGHTING EARLY COMMERCIAL TRACTION FOLLOWING RECENT LICENSING AGREEMENT
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Cyber Enviro-Tech, Inc. disclosed its partnership with AirPower USA under an exclusive manufacturing and distribution agreement. As an environmental technology firm listed on OTCQB with the ticker CETI, Cyber Enviro-Tech has received a boost in its operations.

data.title: Real Time Medical Systems to Demonstrate How Live Data Supports Clinical Standards and Survey Readiness at PALTC26
data.description: Real Time Medical Systems (Real Time), a top post-acute analytics solution rated by KLAS and HITRUST Certified, revealed its involvement in an extra education session at PALTC26, the yearly conference of the Post-Acute and Long-Term Care Medical Association (PALTmed), happening from March 26 to 28 in Anaheim, CA. With increasing regulatory scrutiny and issues like staffing shortages and complex clinical situations on the rise, this is crucial for industry professionals.

data.title: Senzing Launches Agentic Entity Resolution for Apache Spark
data.description: Senzing, a company specializing in identity intelligence, has unveiled the launch of its Senzing for Apache Spark beta program in Las Vegas. This initiative marks the introduction of their top-tier entity resolution technology to distributed batch workloads. For the first time, organizations utilizing Spark on AWS EMR, Databricks, or Snowflake platforms can now effortlessly resolve and correlate massive volumes of records from various data sources. This program offers autonomous data profiling and preparation services and allows for publishing the resolved entities.

data.title: Marqeta to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading modern card issuing platform based in Oakland, California, is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 4:30 pm ET to discuss its first quarter financial results. The call will feature Mike Milotich, Chief Executive Officer, and Patti Kangwankij, Chief Financial Officer. Following the market closure on the same day, a press release containing the Q1 2026 financial results will be published. This event marks an important update for investors and stakeholders of Marqeta, Inc.

data.title: Kopin Corporation Reports Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Kopin Corporation, a top provider of application-specific optical systems and high-performance microdisplays for various industries, disclosed its preliminary unaudited financial performance for the fourth quarter ending on December 27, 2025. The financial synopsis for the fourth quarter of 2025 shows a substantial decrease compared to the same period in 2024. Total revenues plummeted from $14.6 million in Q4 2024 to $8.4 million in Q4 2025, marking a significant decline of 42%. Moreover, product revenues also experienced a decline from $X million in Q4 2024 to $X million in Q4 2025.

data.title: EFG Companies Compliance Experts Reveal Six Priority Issues For Dealers This Year
data.description: In Dallas, retail automotive dealer principals are advised to focus on six key compliance issues in 2026 to steer clear of costly fines and legal expenses that could impact their profits significantly.
